uplink.description: Power-switch metering uplink -> power.* (and energy where present)
uplink._note: Upstream-example input (TTN milesight-iot ws515 codec yaml, Apache-2.0). expected.data via the ported Milesight TLV decoder (oracle). voltage->power.voltage, active_power->power.active, current mA->power.current (A), power_factor %->power.factor, power_consumption Wh->metering.energy.total; switch/socket state as camelCase extras. Satisfies power-meter.
